experience.title: Revenue Coordinator
experience.description: • To ensure that all target market segments are developed for the long-term benefit of the hotel’s business. • Identify trends and anomalies in the various hotels/market places. • Analyse hotels current placement and distribution in all sales channels. • Managing Distribution Management as needed, using various RM systems, including but not limited to Datavision, IDeaS, SynXis and TravelCLICK. • Perform regular competitive shops.

experience.title: Group Reservations Coordinator Reservations Revenue Supervisor
experience.description: Group Coordinator: • Accurate input of Reservations into system. • Input Reservations within specified time periods. • Maximize potential room revenue by following specified selling guidelines. • Maintain Group History Tracking forms. • Set up group routing. • Ensure that rooming lists are free of duplicates. • Respond to guest calls in a timely manner. • Attend Pre Convention meetings as necessary. • Property-wide departmental interaction. • Raise the awareness of inventory issues. • Knowledge of hotel services and events. • Ensure an efficient and professional working environment with open communication. • All convention resumes are audited prior to group's arrival.

experience.title: Cluster Revenue Manager
experience.description: • Maintaining and expanding relationships with existing clients • Daily pick-up analysis, strategy adjustments and reporting. • Perform competitive benchmark studies and follow market trends. • Create and maintain a 13 month rolling demand calendar. • Create and develop pricing strategies in conjunction with the individuality of each hotel. • Provide weekly dynamic forecast of expected results, variances and budget comparisons. • Responsible for assessing, analysing and pricing group business strategies. • Analyse overall monthly hotel performance and provide summary report with recommendations to improve long term strategies. • Oversee and audit the standards and operations of the reservations department. • Regularly check the input and the quality of data (segmentation, denials tracking, etc). • Conduct quarterly property performance review and develop strategic and tactical action. • Responsible for best practice standards to include: competitor analysis; environmental scanning; market modelling; distribution yield management; business mix yield management; length of stay yield management; inventory availability by channel; pricing control and new pricing concepts. • Evaluate performance of distribution partners and contracted rates (OTA, FIT, tour operator, corporate, consortia, crew, groups, etc). • Reduce the cost of distribution by finding new less expensive means of delivering business. • Prepare outline for and support the annual revenue budget process.

experience.title: Cluster Revenue Manager
experience.description: Working with the Hotel teams to maximise revenue to achieve set budgets, profit contribution and market share using revenue management techniques, systems and processes • Implement agreed pricing and inventory management strategies whilst maintaining effective communication links with the cluster properties in order to achieve the budgeted objectives • Working closely with the Cluster Office and the hotels operational teams (GM, M&E, DOS, FOM) to capture insight, analysis and recommendations to drive top line sales. • Monitor competitor pricing and understand the dynamics of the market; using this insight to manage impact on RGI, link to the revenue planning process, and manipulate market mix strategy.

experience.title: Revenue Manager - Pre Opening Team
experience.description: -Monitor and review daily inventory and rate control - including booking pace, regrets, sales thresholds, market segmentation, market success, variance and build-ups, availability calendar, call performances and adjust future strategies as required. -To continuously manipulate availability & rates while ensuring parity across all distribution channels to optimise RevPAR. -Partner with GM, Marketing, and Sales Leaders to implement proactive revenue generating strategies. -Complete weekly, monthly and yearly projections and forecasts. -Collaborate with the sales and marketing team to ensure that initiatives and goals are met -Identify key market strategies by: Identifying opportunities for incremental revenue through analysis, and establishing differential pricing based on market segments, demand, positioning, etc. -Conduct weekly and/or bi-weekly strategy meetings to review market share performance and upcoming pace and pricing, restrictions, projections and channel strategies. -Participate in preparing budgets and business plans. -Measure, analyze and report booking trends, pick up, pace and projections to all stakeholders. -Analyse, interpret, and explain statistical data to develop strategies and plan a course of action. Compile, analyse and report month and year end statistics with recommendations on how to continue to increase future revenue -Have strong rapport with agents handling key markets with OTA’s -Set monthly targets of up selling revenue for front office and reservations department and monitor performance. -To prepare and analyse revenue weekly and month end reporting including critique, findings and strategy actions in conjunction of sales -Develop Revenue Management Policy & Procedures where necessary -Responsible for the Reservations team, including all training and development in reservations and the revenue function. -Conduct daily reviews of all channels to ensure correct pricing, content, imagery and offers are displayed correctly.

experience.title: Director Of Revenue
experience.description: Under the general guidance of the Regional Director of Revenue Management and General Manager, my role is accountable for maximizing Hotel Revenues across rooms, F&B outlets, meetings and events, spa etc. The primary role is to ensure the optimization of revenues and competitive standing and that Mondrian Shoreditch’s goals are achieved or exceeded. Identifies future opportunities and effectively communicates with Sales, Marketing, Operations and eCommerce. Responsible for developing the annual rooms budget and Business Plan with Sales and Marketing, and deployment of the strategies for success. Achieve overall KPI’s and competitive benchmarking for RGI. Oversees the Reservations Department.

linkedin_profile.headline: Aspiring IT Technician | BSc Computer Science (First Class Honours) | Customer-Focused with 10+ Years in Hospitality & Tech Systems
linkedin_profile.about: I’m an aspiring IT Technician with a First-Class Honours degree in Computer Science and over 10 years of experience in hospitality operations. My background combines strong customer service skills with hands-on technical knowledge, giving me a unique perspective in IT support. Through my studies, I gained experience in hardware & software architecture, cloud computing, IoT, and databases, while completing projects such as a POS ordering app, a supermarket management system in Java, and a smart home simulation in Cisco Packet Tracer. In my current role, I also supported conference and banqueting AV setups — connecting laptops, projectors, and troubleshooting issues to ensure smooth events. I’m now looking to grow in IT support and service desk roles, where I can apply my technical skills, problem-solving mindset, and customer-focused approach to deliver reliable and friendly IT services

linkedin_profile.headline: President & CEO of Netrality Data Centers & Chairman & CEO at Amerimar Enterprises
linkedin_profile.about: As Co-Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Amerimar Enterprises, Inc., Jerry oversees the acquisition, financing, redevelopment and disposition of Office, Mixed-Use and Telecom properties for Amerimar. Jerry began his real estate career in 1985. Prior to joining Amerimar in 1988, Jerry was with Dean Witter Realty, Inc. in New York City, where he focused on real estate acquisitions, development and management. Prior to moving back to New York City in the summer of 2005, Jerry was active in the Philadelphia community. He served as a Trustee, Finance and Audit Committee Member, an Executive Committee Member, a Member of National Men’s Cabinet and as Chairman of the Real Estate Committee for the Jewish Federation of Greater Philadelphia. Jerry has also served on the Board of The American Heart Association of Southeastern Pennsylvania. Jerry is an active member in the Metro New York Chapter of Young Presidents Organization (YPO), where he served on the membership committee, and is also an active member in the Big Apple chapter of the World Presidents Organization (WPO). Jerry holds a Bachelor’s degree from The University of Texas with a major in real estate and an MBA from The Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania with a concentration in finance.
